title: Affirm Holdings Q3 Earnings Preview
text: Affirm Holdings (AFRM) was set to report third-quarter fiscal 2023 results on May 9, 2023. The Zacks Consensus Estimate projected a loss of 91 cents per share and revenues of $366.9 million, representing a 3.4% year-over-year increase. Performance Outlook: Resilient consumer spending in the March quarter despite inflationary pressures was expected to support the payment provider. Rising travel and entertainment spending, along with growth in virtual card networks, represented positive factors. Headwinds: Several challenges were anticipated to offset gains. Lower servicing income (projected 2.3% decline). Reduced merchant network revenues (estimated 8% decrease). Higher operating costs from increased processing volumes. Lower loan sale gains (projected 10.1% decline). Analyst Expectations: The analysis indicated mixed signals for an earnings beat. The Earnings ESP stood at -23.08%, with the Most Accurate Estimate at a loss of $1.12 per share versus consensus expectations of 91 cents. Affirm carried a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) rating. Comparable Performance: Peer companies Mastercard, Visa, and Western Union had recently exceeded earnings expectations through improved payment volumes and cross-border transaction growth.
